hero.title: The most trusted
hero.description: Cypher is the best free password manager to securely store, manage and share sensitive data online such as passwords, passkeys and credit cards.
hero.disclaimer: * It's free and requires no installation.

automation.title: Discover the power of automation
automation.description: Automatically create, save, and autofill passwords, so you can focus on what really matters.

sharing.title: Easier sharing
sharing.description: Share passwords with coworkers or family with just one click. Collaborating or granting access has never been easier.

strong.title: Avoid weak passwords
strong.description: Our manager generates secure passwords for all your accounts and saves them so you don't have to memorize them.

access.title: Access from anywhere
access.description: Check your passwords from anywhere and on any device to log into your accounts whenever you need to.

footer.description: Comprehensive digital asset management and personal security system. Your credentials, notes and data, end-to-end encrypted.
